/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libglogd.so.2 -o libglogd.so.0.7.1 CMakeFiles/glog.dir/CMakeFiles/glog.cc.o CMakeFiles/glog_internal.dir/src/demangle.cc.o CMakeFiles/glog_internal.dir/src/flags.cc.o CMakeFiles/glog_internal.dir/src/logging.cc.o CMakeFiles/glog_internal.dir/src/raw_logging.cc.o CMakeFiles/glog_internal.dir/src/signalhandler.cc.o CMakeFiles/glog_internal.dir/src/stacktrace.cc.o CMakeFiles/glog_internal.dir/src/symbolize.cc.o CMakeFiles/glog_internal.dir/src/utilities.cc.o CMakeFiles/glog_internal.dir/src/vlog_is_on.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/data/qy/anaconda3/lib: /data/qy/anaconda3/lib/libgflags.so.2.2.2 -lpthread
